selections.name: Whatsthetimemrwolf
selections.reason: Solid recent form including a close second two starts back. Forgives the last start and looks well placed here.

selections.name: Ms Hubble
selections.reason: Ran a strong second first-up and wasn't far away second-up. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Dancing Tilda
selections.reason: Third-up today and draws the inside barrier. Showed improvement last start and can feature.

selections.name: Moonspell
selections.reason: Rolled along in front and held on for second last start. Has the early speed to overcome the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Gaelic Reward
danger_horse.reason: Showed ability on debut when third. Can bounce back from a poor showing last start.

selections.name: Sunvolt
selections.reason: Has finished second in his last two starts. Freshened up and looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Sweet Marlene
selections.reason: Consistent mare who has boxed on steadily for second in her last two outings. Major player.

selections.name: Comme Ci Comme Ca
selections.reason: Speedy type who was second two starts back. Can improve third-up.

selections.name: Lord Seymour
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Showed some ability last campaign and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Won For Vicki
danger_horse.reason: Debutant who has trialed fairly. Profiles well for this.

selections.name: Be More Pacific
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start over 6.5f. Working up to a win and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Miss Bugatti
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and draws a great barrier. Can improve sharply.

selections.name: Dam Impact
selections.reason: Strips fitter second-up. Showed glimpses last prep and can run into the placings.

selections.name: Magic Socks
selections.reason: Third two starts back. Needs some luck from the draw but has claims on best form.

danger_horse.name: Bonjour Bill
danger_horse.reason: Fourth first-up and will strip fitter. Has room for improvement.

selections.name: Prince Of Prophets
selections.reason: Scored a big win two starts back on heavy going. Has the class edge and can bounce back.

selections.name: Patrioticintention
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and held ground for third last time. Draws perfectly.

selections.name: Dubalene
selections.reason: Consistent form with a win and a third recently. Adds strong value to the exotics.

selections.name: Whiskers
selections.reason: Won by a long neck last start on a soft track. Confidence is high.

danger_horse.name: Sneaky Rich
danger_horse.reason: Forgive the last run. Was a solid fourth prior and is well placed to bounce back.

selections.name: Certify (NZ)
selections.reason: Won nicely second-up. Progressive type who looks ready to go on with it.

selections.name: Crathie Kirk
selections.reason: Third-up and has placed third-up previously. Strong winning hope off recent placings.

selections.name: Graceful Warrior (IRE)
selections.reason: Broke through for a win last start. Draws well and can continue the good form.

selections.name: Divine Effort
selections.reason: Won last start over a similar distance. Gets the inside draw to save ground.

danger_horse.name: Highwire Girl
danger_horse.reason: Faded late last start but has the early speed to be a factor.

selections.name: Rentessis
selections.reason: Resuming but has won first-up previously. Solid form last prep makes him a major threat.

selections.name: Newy
selections.reason: Won well two starts back on a soft track. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the class.

selections.name: Odin's Mount
selections.reason: Racing well with a solid third last start. Can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Diva Rouge
selections.reason: Won nicely last start. Up in class but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Fall For Autumn
danger_horse.reason: Second two starts back. Can bounce back from a mediocre last run.

selections.name: Via Vegas
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two strong wins. Draws perfectly to get a great run.

selections.name: Supreme Command
selections.reason: Won well two starts back. Forgive the last run in a tougher race.

selections.name: Prancing With Fire
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start. Consistent type who maps to get a good trip.

selections.name: Boambee Beach
selections.reason: Not far away last start. Genuine chance to sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Baby Ryan
danger_horse.reason: Second two starts back. Capable of surprising if he brings his best.

selections.name: Hey Daisy
selections.reason: Second two starts back and wasn't far away last time. Capable of taking this out.

selections.name: Boom Break
selections.reason: Set the pace and held on for third last start. Will be prominent early.

selections.name: Zedari
selections.reason: Second-up today. Ran a solid second first-up and has room to improve.

selections.name: Wanjina Rose
selections.reason: Made significant ground last start. Can feature if the pace is on.

danger_horse.name: Personal Space
danger_horse.reason: Won nicely last start on a wet track. Drawn well and has confidence.
